caption: This time-lapse video shows continuous traffic flow along a multi-lane, tree-lined urban roadway with yellow autumn foliage, captured from an elevated viewpoint with a city skyline and distant mountains in the background under a bright, hazy daytime sky.
A video showing vehicles moving along a road in a city during the day.
Heavy nighttime traffic crawls through a snow-covered highway interchange as red brake lights reflect off wet asphalt beneath glowing neon billboards.

This time-lapse video shows continuous traffic flow along a multi-lane, tree-lined urban roadway with yellow autumn foliage, captured from an elevated viewpoint with a city skyline and distant mountains in the background under a bright, hazy daytime sky.
Across the sampled frames, steady traffic moves along a tree-lined boulevard with yellow autumn foliage and a distant skyline.

This time-lapse video shows continuous traffic flow along a multi-lane, tree-lined urban roadway with red autumn foliage, captured from an elevated viewpoint with a city skyline and distant mountains in the background under a bright, hazy daytime sky.
Wow, cars driving on a road lined with pretty yellow trees while a skyline just sits there looking scenic in the background, truly the pinnacle of edge-of-your-seat entertainment.
Cars drive down a pretty tree-lined road, which is not the most exciting thing ever, I suppose.
A small orange and white kitten walks steadily toward the camera across a dirt-covered, leaf-strewn forest floor, with dappled sunlight and hanging vines visible in the softly blurred background.
A cute animal is seen outdoors in a natural setting.
A black puppy splashes through a shallow stream chasing a yellow tennis ball while two children laugh in the background.

A small gray and white kitten walks steadily toward the camera across a dirt-covered, leaf-strewn forest floor, with dappled sunlight and hanging vines visible in the softly blurred background.
Oh sure, just a tiny kitten casually strutting through the woods like it's the star of its own nature documentary, one deliberate paw-step at a time.
A kitten walking through the woods, which is kind of amusing, I guess.
